title: haworthiopsis × kewensis
intro: Haworthiopsis × kewensis is a natural hybrid plant, resulting from the cross between Haworthia fasciata and Haworthia truncata. Its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of anthraquinones, which have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Haworthiopsis × kewensis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, which are said to promote skin health and soothe digestive issues.
